headline: Is Stanley Black & Decker, Inc. (SWK) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is SWK a good stock to buy now? We came across a bullish thesis on Stanley Black & Decker, Inc. on Investing Lawyer’s Substack. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on SWK. Stanley Black & Decker, Inc.’s share was trading at $75.62 as of March 9th. SWK’s trailing and forward P/E were 28.71 and 12.66, […]
